title: 第 148 節
en: 'Yfinghfi h4tam": All those beings " of whom Ahura Mazda knows the goodness ^^ for a sacrifice » From Yasna XLIV, i6; cf. Vendfdid VIII, 20.
YtV.
^ See above, p. 23. ' See above,, p. 22, (Honover), from the first words in it: ahii vairyd. See above, p. 23- ^^ Or 'the fairest Amesha-Spenta;' of. Vend. Introd. IV, 7.
" Impersonated as gods, to obtain from them the benefits of which they are the impersonations.
^ A formula found at the end of most chapters of the Yasna and imitated from Yasna LI [L], a a.
" The Amesha-Spe/rUs (Pahl. Comro. ad Yasna XXVII, fin.).
^* The benefits of which they dispose, and which they impart as rewards to the righteous.
ORMAZD YAyr. 31 [performed] in holiness, all those beings, males ^ and females *, do we worship.
23. 'Y'atha ahft vairy6 : The will of the Lord is the law of holiness ....
Mazda^ bright and glorious, and his strength and vigour '.'
(Bahman Ya^t*.)

24. 'O ZarathuJtra! keep thou for ever that man who is friendly [to me] from the foe unfriendly [to me] ! Do not give lip that friend unto the stroke (of the foe), unto vexations to be borne; wish no harm unto that man who would offer me a sacrifice, be it ever so great or ever so small, if it has reached unto us, the Amesha-Spe«tas.

25. * Here is Vohu-Man6, my creature, O Zarar thu^ra ! here is Asha-Vahi^ta, my creature, O Zarathu^ra! here is Kh^athra-Vairya, my creature, O Zarathuitra! here is Spe«ta-Armaiti, my creature, O Zarathu^tra ! here are Haurvat4/ and Amereti/, who are the reward of the holy ones *, when freed from their bodies, my creatures, O Zarathu^tra !

26. 'Thou knowest this, and how it is, O holy Zarathu^ra ! from my understanding and from my knowledge; namely, how the world first began •, and how it will end ^ ' Which he will impart in return to his worshippers.
' As the Genii who preside over plants and waters, they are very likely entrusted with the care of feeding the righteous in Paradise. ' Cf. Yt. XXII, 18.
32 YA5TS AND stR^ZAHS.
' A thousand remedies, ten thousand remedies * !
27. *[We worship] the well-shapen, tall -formed Strength ; Verethraghna, made by Ahura ; the crushing Ascendant ^, and Spe«ta-Armaiti.
28. * And with the help of Spe«ta-Armaiti, break ye ' asunder their* malice, turn their minds astray, bind their hands, make their knees quake against one another, bind their tongues *.
'When, O Mazda! shall the faithful smite the wicked ® ? When shall the faithful smite the Dru^ ? When shall the faithful smite the wicked ?'
29. Then Zarathurtra said : * I threw you back into the earth ^ and by the eyes of Spe/^ta-Armaiti • the ruffian was made powerless ®.
30. * We worship the powerful Gaokerena^^ made by Mazda ; the powerful Gaokerena, made by Mazda.
31. * We worship the memory of Ahura Mazda, to keep the Holy Word.
' We worship the understanding of Ahura Mazda, to study the Holy Word.
forth the Holy Word.
» Yasna LXVIII, 15 (LXVII, 50). * See Strdzah I, 20.
' Refers probably to the Izeds mentioned in the preceding paragraph.
• Of the foes alluded to § 24. ■ Derezvan; see Yl. XI, 2.
• Cf. Yasna XLVIII [XLVII], 2.
^ I follow the reading zamerena, which is followed by the Pahlavi translation too. In the Yasna IX, 15 (46) Zarathiwtra is said to have obliged the Daivas to hide themselves in the earth.
zh: 「雅夫英格赫‧哈塔姆」(Yfinghfi h4tam)：「凡諸有情眾生，阿胡拉‧馬茲達知其善德者」，獻祭之用。出自《雅斯納》(Yasna) 第四十四卷第十六節；參照《萬迪達德》(Vendídid) 第八卷第二十節。

I appreciate your detailed instructions for translating from Max Müller's *Sacred Books of the East* series into Traditional Chinese. However, I notice that the English source text you've provided is only: "YtV." This appears to be an abbreviation or reference marker rather than actual content to translate. Could you please provide the complete English text passage that you'd like me to translate? Once you share the full English source material, I'll be happy to produce an accurate Traditional Chinese translation following all your specifications (繁體中文、台灣用語、學術語氣、保留Markdown格式等). Please paste the English original text, and I'll deliver the translation.
^ 見上文，第23頁。' 見上文，第22頁（荷諾瓦）。取自其中首句的詞彙：ahii vairyd。見上文，第23頁。^^ 或作「最公正的阿梅沙-斯彭塔」；參見《萬德達》(Vend.)導言第四卷第七節。
化身為神祇，以便從他們身上獲得他們所象徵之福祿。
^ 這是一個在《雅斯納》(Yasna) 大部分章節末尾出現的頌辭，仿照自《雅斯納》第五十一章 [L] 而作。
阿美沙─斯彼塔（Amesha-Spe/rUs）（帕列維語 Comro. ad Yasna XXVII, fin.）
^* 他們所掌有的福報，以及他們作為獎賞賜予正義者的恩惠。
唵馬茲德（Ormazd）聖潔地[行事]，我們禮拜一切那些生靈，男性與女性者。
23. 「如汝所願」(Y'atha ahû vairyo)：主之意志乃聖潔之法則……
瑪茲達，光明而榮耀者，及其力量與活力。
（Bahman Yašt.）
24. 『噢，瑣羅亞斯德！願汝永遠保護那友善於我者，使其免受敵人之害。勿將此友人交付於敵人之擊，使其遭受苦難；勿詆毀那願為我獻祭者，無論其祭祀之大小，若其已達於我等阿美沙斯彼塔（Amesha-Spentas）之前。』

25. * 此處乃沃胡‧瑪那(Vohu-Man)，我之造物，哦查拉圖斯特拉(Zarathu^tra)！此處乃阿莎‧瓦希斯塔(Asha-Vahi^ta)，我之造物，哦查拉圖斯特拉！此處乃克沙特拉‧瓦依利亞(Kh^athra-Vairya)，我之造物，哦查拉圖斯特拉！此處乃斯彼塔‧阿爾邁蒂(Spe«ta-Armaiti)，我之造物，哦查拉圖斯特拉！此處乃豪瓦特和阿美瑞蒂(Haurvat4/ and Amereti/)，彼等乃聖者之報償*，當彼等脫離肉身之時，我之造物，哦查拉圖斯特拉！
26. 「聖祆教先知瑣羅亞斯德啊！你知悉此事，及其如何而成，乃出於我的理解與我的知識；即世界最初如何開始•，及其將如何終結^。」他將轉而把此事啟示予他的信眾。
「作為主宰植物與水源的神靈，他們很可能被委託在樂園中照顧義人的飲食。」參見《雅什特經》第二十二章第十八節。
32 雅茲納與斯特羅扎
千般藥物，萬般藥物！*
27. *[我們禮拜]形狀良好、身形高大的力量；由阿胡拉所造的韋雷特拉格納（Verethraghna）；摧毀的勝利者^，以及斯佩塔‧阿爾邁蒂（Speṭa-Armaiti）。
28. * 藉著斯佩塔‧阿爾邁蒂（Spenta-Armaiti）的幫助，摧毀他們的惡意，使其心智迷亂，束縛他們的雙手，令其雙膝相互顫抖，縛住他們的舌頭 *。
「啊，馬茲達！何時忠信者將擊敗邪惡者？何時忠信者將擊敗德魯傑？何時忠信者將擊敗邪惡者？」
29. 爾時瑣羅亞斯德說：「我將你擲回大地，並藉由斯佩塔‧阿爾邁蒂（Spenta-Armaiti）的眼睛，使那粗暴者失去了力量。」
30. * 我們禮拜由瑪茲達所造的強大蓋奧克瑞納^^；由瑪茲達所造的強大蓋奧克瑞納。
31. * 我們祭祀阿胡拉‧馬茲達（Ahura Mazda）之記憶，以保持聖言。
我們禮敬阿胡拉‧瑪茲達（Ahura Mazda）的智慧，以研習聖言為本。
發出神聖的言語。
» 雅斯那 LXVIII, 15（LXVII, 50）。* 參見《史特德扎》（Strdzah）I, 20。
可能係指前段所述之伊茲德(Izeds)。
• 第 24 節所提及之敵人。■ 德雷茲萬（Derezvan）；參見《雅斯那》(Yl.) 第十一章第 2 節。
• 參見《雅斯那》第四十八篇[第四十七篇]，第二節。
^ 我採用 zamerena 之讀法，帕拉維譯本亦采此讀法。在《雅斯那》第九卷第十五節（第四十六段）中，據謂査拉圖斯特拉曾迫使眾魔強行隱沒於地下。
